daily_reality.typical_day: Starts 8:00. Reviews digital tools and data pipelines. Evaluates new SaaS tools for the company. Attends BIM coordination meetings. Works with BD team to improve tender response quality. Manages data standards across 15 active projects.
daily_reality.biggest_time_waste: The BD team still uses Excel and manual portal checks. No single source of truth for pipeline. Duplicate data entry between systems.
daily_reality.weekly_volume: Oversees pipeline of ~200 tenders in tracking, 20 active bids

psychology.tech_savviness: high — evaluates and implements digital tools professionally
psychology.risk_tolerance: moderate — pushes for innovation but needs ROI justification
psychology.decision_speed: analytical — needs data to support recommendations to Geschäftsführung

first_screen: Analytics: win rate, average bid value, response times
expectations.current_pain_level: 8/10 — current Access database is failing, team is losing opportunities
